modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't open Perceptive Content application.

full_description_text:  
I can't open Perceptive Content, it's just not working. I tried to access it but nothing happens. I really need to get into it for my work, but it keeps failing to open. Please help me fix this issue.
description: I can't open Perceptive Content, it's just not working. I tried to access it but nothing happens. I really need to get into it for my work, but it keeps failing to open. Please help me fix this issue.
